description: A new client wants to roll over an old 401(k) from a previous employer into a new IRA.

nodes.task_description: Open a new Rollover IRA account for the client.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the new IRA account to receive the funds.

nodes.task_description: Assist the client in initiating a direct rollover from their old 401(k) provider.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the client with the necessary forms and account information to give to their old provider.

nodes.task_description: Once the funds are received, invest them according to the client's investment strategy.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms receipt of the rollover check and invests the funds into the client's model portfolio.
